name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem
<!-- What limitation or pain point does this address? -->


## Proposed solution
<!-- How should it work? Include CLI usage examples if applicable. -->

```bash
# Example usage
koda --new-flag "value"
```

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse. -->


## Scope
<!-- Which area of the codebase would this touch? -->
- [ ] Tools (src/tools/)
- [ ] Providers (src/providers/)
- [ ] Approval system (src/approval.rs)
- [ ] REPL / input (src/repl.rs, src/input.rs)
- [ ] Display / UX (src/display.rs, src/markdown.rs)
- [ ] Config (src/config.rs)
- [ ] Agents (agents/)
- [ ] New module
